channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car has been abandoned in our car park for 3 years now, 1st April
item.description:
Car has been abandoned in our car park for a number of years now and we would like to have it removed as soon as possible please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Peninsula Square, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Next to communal bins, top of Hobbs Road on Benton's Lane Estate

item.description:
This veicle has been here for around 6 weeks. It has a flat tyre.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Diameter Road, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.title: Van on Merriman rd se3 8sb, 1st April
item.description:
White Peugeot van parked on Merriman rd se3 8sb for last 4 days no.tax or mot
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merriman Road, Kidbrooke

item.title: Large holes and uneven surface in a utility co manhole cover, 1st April
item.description:
There is an electric company utility manhole cover in the footpath around Charterhouse Square which has a large hole in it and its got an uneven surface. Can this be reported to the relevant authority and repaired before some one falls?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charterhouse Square, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish on road in Love Walk SE5 at Denmark Hill end, 1st April
item.description:
Old gym equipment on road outside 17 Love Walk SE5 taking up valuable parking space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous wire, trip and electrical hazard, 1st April
item.description:
#19 still charging vehicle across pavement but not taking appropriate steps to ensure electrical and trip hazards are mitigated, despite these being simple and cheap to do. Unacceptable and dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Atherfold Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items dumped, 1st April
item.description:
Items dumped in carpark
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-8, Withens Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unstable Tree: Public Footpath at 361 Sutherland Avenue, 1st April
item.description:
This is a formal request for an inspection of the council-maintained tree located on the public footpath at 361 Sutherland Avenue. Buses travelling towards Falconwood frequently strike the tree's overhanging branches, causing the entire structure to shake significantly. This is a recurring issue that has already resulted in a large branch falling onto the footpath and road last month immediately following a bus impact. There is concern that the constant shaking from these collisions is compromising the tree's stability and poses a risk of damage to the public, passing traffic, and nearby property. Please arrange for an officer to assess the tree's condition and provide a professional opinion on the necessary steps to ensure the safety of the area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ash Row, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 1st April

item.title: Graffiti on Cherry Garden Park wall, by City Cruises, 1st April
item.description:
Ugly. More is being added to it. Has been there for several months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 152, Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking emergency access road, 1st April
item.description:
I live in Granby Road and the emergency access road has been blocked by a resident in Westmount Road. They have fly tipped at the back of their property for some time and have now started tipping along my fence. This now includes a washing machine which enables potential thieves to climb up and over my fence and into my garden.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granby Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking emergency vehicle access, 1st April
item.description:
The clientele of the primitive butcher restaurant are blocking emergency access to acacia road by parking on the double yellow lines

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lancaster Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A fridge left, 1st April
item.description:
A fridge has been dumped in a struggling small green space in front of the entrance of Bush Hill Park. I hope penalties for fly tipping increase and the same time educational measures, campaigns, increase too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecil Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 1st April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 01/04/26 12:53 Fly-tipping Lat/Long - 51.4231078, -0.0584447 what3words - sheets.pepper.scam Nearest address - 84A, Lawrie Park Road, Sydenham, London, SE26 6DX Last week, two technicians from Openreach left their rubbish after their intervention at 84 Lawrie Park Road, SE26 6DX. Thank you. Reference - 5456176 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 01/04/2026 12:52 Last week, two technicians from Openreach left their rubbish after their intervention at 84 Lawrie Park Road, SE26 6DX. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Lawrie Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pot hole and multiple cracks around, 1st April
item.description:
This pot hole has been there for months and appears to have gotten wider with cracks around it. It’s in the middle of Stuart Evans Close opposite house No. 10

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stuart Evans Close, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
